name: flat_attrs_and_metrics
description: Single dim with attributes and measureGroup — flat table

name: two_dim_metrics_in_rows
description: measureGroup in dim0 → each metric is a row; attributes fan out as columns

name: two_dim_metrics_in_cols
description: Attributes in dim0 (rows), measureGroup in dim1 (columns) — most common layout

name: wide_few_rows_many_cols
description: Single attribute in dim0, multiple attributes + measureGroup in dim1 → wide DataFrame

name: metrics_only
description: No attributes — single row of aggregate metric values

name: single_metric_many_rows
description: Three attributes + one metric — tall narrow table

name: totals_grand_col_sum
description: Grand total appended as extra columns; single label in row dim

name: totals_grand_row_sum
description: Grand total appended as extra rows; single label in col dim

name: totals_grand_row_two_col_labels
description: Grand total rows; column dim has two labels — tests index padding

name: totals_grand_col_two_row_labels
description: Grand total columns; row dim has two labels — tests column index padding

name: totals_multi_agg
description: SUM, MAX, AVG grand total rows for the same metric

name: totals_subtotal_col
description: Subtotal columns per region (outer attr); grand total also present

name: totals_subtotal_row
description: Subtotal rows per region (outer attr in row dim); grand total also present

name: dim_r_m
description: dim0=[region], dim1=[measureGroup] — 1 row attr, metrics in cols

name: dim_rc_m
description: dim0=[region, products.category], dim1=[measureGroup]

name: dim_rcs_m
description: dim0=[region, products.category, order_status], dim1=[measureGroup]

name: dim_m_c
description: dim0=[measureGroup], dim1=[products.category] — metrics in rows, 1 col attr

name: dim_m_cs
description: dim0=[measureGroup], dim1=[products.category, order_status]

name: dim_m_csy
description: dim0=[measureGroup], dim1=[products.category, order_status, date.year]

name: dim_r_cm
description: dim0=[region], dim1=[products.category, measureGroup]

name: dim_rs_cm
description: dim0=[region, order_status], dim1=[products.category, measureGroup]

name: dim_r_csm
description: dim0=[region], dim1=[products.category, order_status, measureGroup]

name: dim_rs_cym
description: dim0=[region, order_status], dim1=[products.category, date.year, measureGroup]

name: dim_rcs_ym
description: dim0=[region, products.category, order_status], dim1=[date.year, measureGroup]

name: dim_r_csym
description: dim0=[region], dim1=[products.category, order_status, date.year, measureGroup]

name: tot_d0_sub
description: Base A: subtotal per region (rolls up category) → extra rows in dim0

name: tot_d0_grand
description: Base A: grand total of dim0 (all items) → extra column in dim1

name: tot_d0_sub_grand
description: Base A: per-region subtotals AND grand total of dim0

name: tot_d1_sub
description: Base B: subtotal per order_status (rolls up date.year) → extra columns in dim1

name: tot_d1_grand
description: Base B: grand total of dim1 (all items) → extra row in dim0

name: tot_d1_sub_grand
description: Base B: per-status subtotals AND grand total of dim1

name: tot_d0sub_d1sub
description: Base C: subtotals in both dims (row subtotal per region + col subtotal per status)

name: tot_d0sub_d1grand
description: Base C: row subtotals per region + grand total of dim1 → extra col rows + SUM row

name: tot_d0grand_d1sub
description: Base C: grand total of dim0 + col subtotals per status

name: tot_d0grand_d1grand
description: Base C: grand total of dim0 + grand total of dim1

name: totals_both_dims
description: Grand total rows AND grand total columns at the same time
